case_title: EDWARD WONG VS. MANUEL D. URBINA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, EDMOND SERVED MAR-12-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COLOM-URBINA, MARIA
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-19-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS MANUEL URBINA AND MARIA COLOM-URBINA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-05-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MANUEL URBINA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
